content.thinking: Got a Dolt SIGSEGV crash on `gt mail inbox`. This is a Dolt database corruption or lock issue. Let me retry once — transient crashes happen with embedded Dolt.

content.text: Dolt crash on mail check — likely transient lock contention. Retrying.

input.description: Retry mail inbox after brief pause
